li.label: what is that fragrance
li.description: I've never smelled anything like this mystical fragrance before. Where could it be coming from?

li.label: such a lovely fragrance
li.description: This gentle floral fragrance makes me feel so much calmer.

li.label: flowers lifted my spirits
li.description: A rich floral fragrance surrounds me. I can't help but smile.

li.label: what a wonderful fragrance
li.description: This enchanting floral fragrance stays with me all day. I feel like everything will go my way!
